description: A single event metadata detail item consisting of a Font Awesome icon and a text label, with variant modifier classes for date, venue, time, and ticket information.

stories.name: Date
stories.description: Event date detail with calendar icon

stories.name: Venue
stories.description: Event venue detail with location icon and aria-label

props.text: University of Sheffield | Broad Lane Black, Lecture Theatre 8

stories.name: Group
stories.description: Multiple event details shown together as typically rendered on an event page

instances.text: University of Sheffield | Broad Lane Black, Lecture Theatre 8

notes: The variant prop maps to a modifier class appended to the root element (e.g. 'ev-date', 'ev-venue'). The iconClass prop is the full Font Awesome class string applied to the <i> element. The icon is aria-hidden='true' in some samples — hardcode aria-hidden='true' on the icon element. ariaLabel is only present on ev-venue variants in the observed samples. The first sample shows a variant with no modifier class and inner Drupal views markup — this is a CMS-rendered variant not worth modelling as a prop.
